Uses of Class
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.GlobalRequirements

Packages that use GlobalRequirements 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.

  • Uses of GlobalRequirements in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return GlobalRequirements 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static GlobalRequirements GlobalRequirements.withCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack traces should omit references to this library.
    static GlobalRequirements GlobalRequirements.withDefaultTerminalEncoding()
    Indicates that the terminal encoding should be auto-detected.
    static GlobalRequirements GlobalRequirements.withDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    static GlobalRequirements GlobalRequirements.withoutCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates that exception stack traces should contain references to this library.
    static GlobalRequirements GlobalRequirements.withoutDiff()
    Indicates that exceptions should not show the difference between the actual and expected values.
    static GlobalRequirements GlobalRequirements.withTerminalEncoding​(TerminalEncoding encoding)
    Indicates the type of encoding that the terminal supports.
